name: The Union
resolution_reason: Humans and Gnomes remain primary; Half-Elves, Elves, and Yuan-Ti are formalized as durable resident blocs in the exchange and mediation core.
future_rule: This demographic record may be superseded only by an explicit corrective release preserving contradiction history and source-backed support.
